testcase.name: Registro com dados válidos

failure.message: Esperado 'Your account was created successfully', mas obtido 'If you have an account with us you can sign-up for free instant online access. You will have to provide some personal information.'

testcase.failure: Failing step: Then devo ver a mensagem de sucesso "Your account was created successfully" ... failed in 0.117s Location: features/registersucess.feature:9 ASSERT FAILED: Esperado 'Your account was created successfully', mas obtido 'If you have an account with us you can sign-up for free instant online access. You will have to provide some personal information.'
